channel.title: Modernization on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Modernization on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: Announcing .NET Modernization for Beginners
item.description:
Microsoft announced a free, open-source hands-on course for modernizing a legacy ASP.NET application to .NET 10 using the GitHub Copilot modernization agent. The course is step-by-step and aimed at beginners.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: dotnet: Modernize .NET applications in the GitHub Copilot app
item.description:
The GitHub Copilot app now includes an interactive upgrade canvas for modernizing .NET applications. It supports the upgrade process from assessment through execution.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Migrate – GitHub Copilot Modernization integration for at scale code assessments
item.description:
Azure Migrate public preview now integrates with GitHub Copilot Modernization to provide at-scale code insights. The integration combines Azure Migrate’s portfolio-level discovery and assessment with Copilot’s context-aware code analysis.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: dotnet: Join us for .NET Day on Agentic Modernization Livestream
item.description:
Microsoft announced a .NET Day livestream focused on agentic modernization. The post is an event announcement and does not include technical product changes or release details.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Github Copilot modernization
item.description:
GitHub Copilot modernization agent is now generally available. It provides coordinated orchestration from estate to code to help scale application assessments and upgrades across an app portfolio.

  • Source: Azure Updates
